title: Commit window opened for PR 93 Sonar handoff
body: Opalescent Glowing Constellation opened commit-window claim e29dc1d6-c218-4366-a6db-1961584a73c9 after Riverine's index/head claim became stale. Intended pathspecs: PR 93 Sonar plans/snags, observability thread handoff, repo-continuity handoff, current shared comms log, comms events for Sonar disposition/commit window, active/closed claim lifecycle. Explicitly not staging Riverine-claimed napkin.md or user-snippets.md work.
